items.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
items.summary: The Pentagon has signed deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks, highlighting government adoption of AI technologies.
items.insight: This signals a major push for AI in defense and intelligence, creating opportunities for IT professionals with security clearances and expertise in AI deployment on secure infrastructure.

items.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
items.summary: Ubuntu services experienced outages due to a DDoS attack, affecting users relying on the popular Linux distribution.
items.insight: This incident underscores the vulnerability of critical infrastructure even for major open-source projects, reminding IT pros to implement robust DDoS mitigation and redundancy for cloud-based services.
items.english_title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack

items.title: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage
items.summary: VS Code is inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into git commits even when Copilot wasn't used, causing confusion among developers.
items.insight: This highlights a flaw in AI attribution features that can pollute commit history and misrepresent contributions. IT professionals should carefully review and potentially disable automatic co-author tags to maintain accurate version control records.
items.english_title: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage

items.title: The agent harness belongs outside the sandbox
items.summary: The article argues that the harness controlling AI agents should be placed outside the sandbox environment for better safety and oversight.
items.insight: This is a critical architectural consideration for building secure and controllable AI agents. IT pros designing agent systems should place control logic externally to avoid sandbox escapes and maintain a clear separation of powers.
items.english_title: The agent harness belongs outside the sandbox
